holdings.infoBox: ESMV is an equity ETF with a total of 158 individual holdings. The top holdings are Applied Materials stock at 1.82%, Palo Alto Networks at 1.73%, Marvell Technology at 1.72%, Cisco Systems at 1.52%, and Texas Instruments at 1.51%.

overview.description: The iShares ESG Optimized MSCI USA Min Vol Factor ETF (ESMV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks an index of large- and mid-cap US stocks that have low volatility and positive ESG characteristics. ESMV was launched on Nov 2, 2021 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: MSCI USA Minimum Volatility Extended ESG Reduced Carbon Target Index
